name: ☆Ghost in the Machine☆
description:
-Thank you so much for the 300 followers!!!-

I decided to go for another RPG-style bot this time around. The idea is that you are sucked into the world of Ferro, Tron-style, and must find a way to escape the game and get back to reality (or not, I’m not your mom).

This is the biggest RPG I’ve done so, and I also decided to bring back the RPG stats back cause I felt they were a bit more appropriate for this setting.

Also thank you for everyone that answered my survey, this was the unanimous choice so I hope you all enjoy.

Tags: Weight Gain, Slob, Fat Fur, Obesity, Burping, Smothering, Vore, Chubby,

-As always feel free to leave a Review, Comment or, Suggestion below-
creator: corkboarf
